Healthcare · Wellness

Growth marketingbuilt for wellness.

Membership funnels, community content, and retention-focused email systems.

Book a Strategy Call
At a Glance

KINEXIS provides wellness marketing including social media marketing services, email marketing & automation, website design & development. We build strategies around how wellness buyers search and decide, not generic agency templates. Most engagements combine SEO and paid media with conversion-focused landing pages. Timelines vary by channel: paid media produces data within days, SEO typically needs 60 to 90 days for meaningful movement.

Why wellness marketing is different

  • →Wellness buyers research extensively before making purchasing decisions
  • →Competition for high-intent wellness keywords continues to intensify
  • →Generic marketing playbooks fail to address wellness-specific buyer psychology
  • →Attribution and ROI measurement require industry-specific conversion tracking

Our approach

We don't apply generic agency playbooks to wellness businesses. Every strategy starts with how your buyers search, evaluate, and decide, then works backward to channel mix, content architecture, and conversion paths.

For wellness companies, that means social media marketing services, email marketing & automation, website design & development, content marketing services working as one integrated system, not disconnected tactics managed by separate vendors.

Competing locally or scaling nationally, the fundamentals are the same: rankings that stick, campaigns that improve with data, and conversion paths that turn traffic into revenue.

Recommended services

Social Media Marketing Services

Platform-native content and paid social for wellness brands that need visibility where your audience already spends time.

Explore Social Strategy

Email Marketing & Automation

Lifecycle email for wellness businesses: welcome sequences, nurture flows, and win-back campaigns tied to repeat revenue.

Explore Email Strategy

Website Design & Development

Sites built for how wellness prospects compare options, build trust, and take action. Fast, mobile-first, and wired to your CRM.

Explore Web Design Process

Content Marketing Services

Content that answers what wellness buyers search for at every stage, from first research to final decision.

View service details

Expected outcomes

2.5X

membership signups · funnel rebuild

37%

class booking fill rate

22%

90-day member retention lift

Common Questions

FAQ

Do you specialize in wellness marketing?>

Yes. We work with wellness companies across healthcare and build strategies specific to your buyer journey, competitive landscape, and revenue model.

How long before we see results?>

Paid media produces data within days. SEO and content typically show meaningful movement in 60 to 90 days. We set clear milestones at kickoff so expectations align with your timeline.

Can you work with our existing marketing team?>

Absolutely. We collaborate with in-house teams, other agencies, and fractional CMOs. We fill gaps, provide specialized execution, or lead the entire growth program.

Explore Further
